tasks.label: Build for L476RG: DEBUG
tasks.command: west build -b nucleo_l476rg/stm32l476xx -d firmware/build/nucleo_l476rg firmware/ -- -DOVERLAY_CONFIG=debug.conf && cp firmware/build/nucleo_l476rg/compile_commands.json firmware/build/compile_commands.json

tasks.label: Build for L476RG: DEBUG (Pristine)
tasks.command: west build -b nucleo_l476rg/stm32l476xx -d firmware/build/nucleo_l476rg firmware/ -p always -- -DOVERLAY_CONFIG=debug.conf && cp firmware/build/nucleo_l476rg/compile_commands.json firmware/build/compile_commands.json

tasks.label: Build for L476RG: Production (Pristine)
tasks.command: west build -b nucleo_l476rg/stm32l476xx -d firmware/build/nucleo_l476rg firmware/ -p always -- -DOVERLAY_CONFIG=production.conf && cp firmware/build/nucleo_l476rg/compile_commands.json firmware/build/compile_commands.json

tasks.label: Build for F303RE: DEBUG
tasks.command: west build -b nucleo_f303re/stm32f303xe -d firmware/build/nucleo_f303re firmware/ -- -DOVERLAY_CONFIG=debug.conf && cp firmware/build/nucleo_f303re/compile_commands.json firmware/build/compile_commands.json

tasks.label: Build for F303RE: DEBUG (Pristine)
tasks.command: west build -b nucleo_f303re/stm32f303xe -d firmware/build/nucleo_f303re firmware/ -p always -- -DOVERLAY_CONFIG=debug.conf && cp firmware/build/nucleo_f303re/compile_commands.json firmware/build/compile_commands.json

tasks.label: Build for F303RE: Production (Pristine)
tasks.command: west build -b nucleo_f303re/stm32f303xe -d firmware/build/nucleo_f303re firmware/ -p always -- -DOVERLAY_CONFIG=production.conf && cp firmware/build/nucleo_f303re/compile_commands.json firmware/build/compile_commands.json
